title: Replace Salesforce Navigation Links with Consistent Blue Cloud Icons
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want all buttons and links that navigate to Salesforce to be visually consistent with Salesforce blue cloud icons, so that I always know when an action will take me to Salesforce versus staying in DataTools Pro.
description:
Establish a visual convention: anything styled in Salesforce blue navigates to Salesforce; anything green is internal to DataTools Pro. This ticket inventories all locations where Salesforce navigation icons and link colors need updating.

## Locations
1. **Dictionary**: Add Salesforce cloud icon to launch Salesforce dictionary
2. **Dictionary object details**: Update launch icon to Salesforce cloud
3. **Field Details**: See MBT-768 for detailed styling
4. **Metrics Analytics tab**: Change report link color to blue (currently green) since it opens in Salesforce. Future enhancement will make green links open internal report details.
5. **Metrics Analyst**: Change icon to Salesforce cloud, report link color to blue

## Design Principle
- Blue = opens Salesforce in a new window
- Green = internal DataTools Pro action
- Blue styling is agnostic to branding/theming (not affected by custom primary color)
acceptance_criteria: All buttons/links that navigate to Salesforce use the Salesforce blue cloud icon
Salesforce links use blue text color instead of green
Blue Salesforce styling is not affected by custom branding/primary color settings
Dictionary page shows Salesforce cloud icon for launching Salesforce dictionary
Dictionary object details show Salesforce cloud icon
Metrics Analytics tab report links are blue
Metrics Analyst report links and icons are blue
Green styling remains for internal DataTools Pro actions
ux_changes: Replaced all Salesforce navigation buttons/links across the app with consistent Salesforce blue cloud icons and blue text. Establishes visual convention: blue = Salesforce, green = internal.
implementation_notes: Salesforce blue color applied as a hard-coded style (not affected by branding primary color). Cloud icon SVGs used consistently. Updated across Dictionary, Dictionary details, Field Details, Metrics Analytics, and Metrics Analyst pages.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the changes were already completed across all identified locations.
